title: Professional Data Analyst Portfolio & Services Website

requirements.text: Create a Hero/Landing section with a compelling headline, tagline, and a brief introduction positioning the owner as a professional data analyst. Include a clear call-to-action button (e.g., 'Hire Me' or 'View My Work') that scrolls to the services or contact section.

quotes: create a website for me as data analyst and setup full serviced provided as data analyst

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is the first visible section on the page
Headline and tagline clearly communicate data analyst identity
At least one call-to-action button is visible and functional (smooth scrolls to target section)

requirements.text: Create a Services section listing all full data analyst services offered, including: Data Cleaning & Preparation, Data Visualization, Statistical Analysis, Business Reporting & Dashboards, Data Consulting, Predictive Modeling, and Database Management. Each service should have an icon, title, and short description.

quotes: setup full serviced provided as data analyst

acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 services are displayed in a card/grid layout
Each service card has an icon, title, and description
Section is labeled 'Services' and is accessible via navigation

requirements.text: Create an About Me section featuring a professional bio, a list of key skills (e.g., Python, SQL, Excel, Tableau, Power BI, R), and a tools/technologies used showcase with recognizable icons or badges.
acceptanceCriteria: About section includes bio text, skills list, and tools showcase
Skills are displayed as badges or tags
Section is accessible via navigation

requirements.text: Create a Portfolio/Projects section showcasing sample or placeholder past data analysis projects. Each project card should include a project title, short description, tools used, and a placeholder image or chart graphic.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 project cards are displayed in a grid layout
Each card has a title, description, and tools used tags
Section is accessible via navigation

requirements.text: Create a Pricing/Packages section displaying at least three service tiers (e.g., Basic, Standard, Premium) with feature lists and a highlighted recommended plan. Each tier should have a price placeholder and a 'Get Started' CTA.
acceptanceCriteria: Three pricing tiers are displayed side by side
Each tier has a name, price placeholder, feature list, and CTA button
One tier is visually highlighted as recommended

requirements.text: Create a Testimonials section displaying at least three placeholder client reviews with a quote, client name, and company/role. Use a card or carousel layout.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 testimonials are displayed
Each testimonial includes a quote, name, and role/company
Section is visually distinct from adjacent sections

requirements.text: Create a Contact section with a form containing fields for: Name, Email, Subject, and Message. Include a Submit button. Store submitted contact messages in the backend so they can be retrieved later.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form is rendered with all four fields and a submit button
Form submission sends data to the backend and stores the message
User sees a success confirmation after submitting
Form validates that required fields are not empty before submission

requirements.text: Add a sticky top navigation bar with links to all major sections (Home, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact) that use smooth scrolling. Include a logo/name on the left and a mobile hamburger menu for smaller screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation is sticky at the top of the page
All section links scroll smoothly to their targets
Navigation collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile viewports
Logo or name is visible on the left side

requirements.text: Apply a dark, data-tech-inspired visual theme with a deep charcoal/dark navy background, bright teal or green accent colors, clean sans-serif typography, and subtle data-grid or geometric patterns. Use consistent spacing, card shadows, and micro-animations (e.g., fade-in on scroll) throughout the page.
acceptanceCriteria: A consistent dark color palette is applied site-wide
Accent colors are used for buttons, highlights, and section titles
Typography is clean and readable across all sections
At least subtle animations or transitions are present

constraints: All contact form submissions must be stored in the Motoko backend actor
No external databases or third-party email services should be used
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Payment processing or actual billing integration
CMS or admin dashboard for editing content dynamically

required: Professional abstract data visualization banner with glowing teal grid lines and floating data points on a dark navy background (hero-banner.dim_1440x600.png)
Clean geometric data analyst profile avatar illustration with teal accents on dark background (analyst-avatar.dim_400x400.png)
Abstract chart and graph collage thumbnail for portfolio project card 1 (project-thumb-1.dim_600x400.png)
Abstract map and geospatial data visualization thumbnail for portfolio project card 2 (project-thumb-2.dim_600x400.png)
Abstract bar chart and KPI dashboard thumbnail for portfolio project card 3 (project-thumb-3.dim_600x400.png)
